'''chanuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaali|jaali]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaali|jaali]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chanuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chænizhith|chænizhith]] || [[word:chænizhij|chænizhij]] || [[word:chænizhish|chænizhish]] || [[word:chænizhi|chænizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chanunuzhuth|chanunuzhuth]] || [[word:chanunuzhuj|chanunuzhuj]] || [[word:chanunuzhush|chanunuzhush]] || [[word:chanunuzhu|chanunuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanuzhuth|chanuzhuth]] || [[word:chanuzhuj|chanuzhuj]] || [[word:chanuzhush|chanuzhush]] || [[word:chanuzhu|chanuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanufzhuth|chanufzhuth]] || [[word:chanufzhuj|chanufzhuj]] || [[word:chanufzhush|chanufzhush]] || [[word:chanufzhuf|chanufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chanuzhuthu|chanuzhuthu]] || [[word:chanuzhuju|chanuzhuju]] || [[word:chanuzhushu|chanuzhushu]] || [[word:chanuzhuku|chanuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chanuzhuth|chanuzhuth]] || [[word:chanuzhuj|chanuzhuj]] || [[word:chanuzhush|chanuzhush]] || [[word:chanuzhu|chanuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chanuzhuthul|chanuzhuthul]] || [[word:chanuzhujul|chanuzhujul]] || [[word:chanuzhushul|chanuzhushul]] || [[word:chanuzhukul|chanuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chanuzhuthuthu|chanuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:chanuzhujuju|chanuzhujuju]] || [[word:chanuzhushushu|chanuzhushushu]] || [[word:chanuzhuku|chanuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chanuzhuthun|chanuzhuthun]] || [[word:chanuzhujun|chanuzhujun]] || [[word:chanuzhushun|chanuzhushun]] || [[word:chanuzhukun|chanuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chanuzhuthuoro|chanuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:chanuzhujuoro|chanuzhujuoro]] || [[word:chanuzhushuoro|chanuzhushuoro]] || [[word:chanuzhukuoro|chanuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
